top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO Stress Tests Crypto’s Bid to Reinvent Stocks
top_signals.summary: For years, crypto firms have argued that blockchain technology could create markets for private companies long before they reach Wall Street. SpaceX provided the industry’s biggest test yet. The results were mixed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Montreal Transit System REM to Sell Up to C$2 Billion Bonds
top_signals.summary: Réseau express métropolitain (REM), an automated light metro system in Greater Montreal, is looking to raise as much as C$2 billion ($1.43 million) in a bond sale, according to a spokesperson with CDPQ Infra, confirming an earlier Bloomberg report.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Oil Reserve Hits 43-Year Low as Trump Aims to Tame Gas Prices - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: US Oil Reserve Hits 43-Year Low as Trump Aims to Tame Gas Prices  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
